news_items.headline: Mariners Check Heat, Get Burned, Feel Alive
Walking Off into the Wildcard! Dbacks 6, A’s 5
news_items.summary: The Arizona Diamondbacks were able to even the series with the Athletics Tuesday night thanks to a heroic walkoff from the veteran Ildemaro Vargas and a solid major league debut from Kohl Drake. Kohl Drake gave the Dbacks 5 much needed solid innings tonight for his major league debut. Overall his stuff was just ok, […]
